asset.title: Private Investment Room V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: An excellent, highly polished narrated explainer showing the collaborative investment room workflow, featuring structured spreadsheets, version control, and human-in-the-loop agent proposals.

featureClarity.evidence: Clear demonstration of data enrichment, agent proposals, and cell-level versioning.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full flow from importing accounts to agent drafting and manual verification.

visualDesign.evidence: High-quality dark mode interface with clean layout and smooth transitions.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, agents, and audit trails.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Realistic UI interactions, cursor movements, and real-time state updates.

legibility.evidence: Some spreadsheet cells and version logs are small and hard to read without zooming.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses high-trust financial workflows and AI collaboration safety.

productionHonesty.evidence: Explicitly highlights that agents propose changes rather than writing directly.

defects.observed: The version history log text at the bottom of the screen is quite small and difficult to read.
defects.fix: Increase the font size or add a brief zoom-in effect on the version history panel.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how NodeRoom enables high-trust investment workflows with cell-level versioning and human-approved agent proposals.
